title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at WeWork India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at WeWork India
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!
